name: Shanghai Friendess Electronic Technology Corporation Limited
summary: Shanghai Friendess Electronic Technology Corporation Limited engages in the research and development, manufacture, and sale of laser cutting control products and software. It offers laser cutting control systems, high-precision visual positioning systems, integrated CNC systems, and other accessories, as well as CypCut, HypCut ultra high power, and CypTube square tube laser cutting control software. The company was founded in 2007 and is based in Shanghai, China.
